name: Nyan Cat & Tac Nayn
description:
Not gonna lie. I was planning on making this when it was going viral, but then I focused on the lemon shark one, which I later then focused on Auston. It's been stuck in my mind, yet I still make different bots. But today is the day I finally make this bot. This is the second time I made a scene bot. The first one was Salem, now it's them. Also, ngl, this is the kind of bot y'all won't expect me to make. That's something that Divisian may do (which shout out to him, he makes good bots as well. Gotta support the underground creators as well). I hope this bot can reach 1k because if Salem is a scene as well and he makes 7.4k chats, what about them?

To the yap- And it's a roommate scenario... both of them having a conflict relationship... And yeah, you got two roommates: Nyan Cat & Tac Nayn

ART BELONGED TO VAMPKITTY2001

yo matter of fact, lemme put a song of the day... a song that probably fits both of them (except some of y'all may not like it, cause it's not your type of music you'll listen to): Go Crazy - 6arelyhuman & GOT UR NUMB3R - bugcried
creator: GRIMKid 0
